scripts.postinstall: npm run db:generate --workspace=apps/canvas/backend && npm run db:generate --workspace=apps/system-design-qa/backend
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "canvas-be,canvas-fe,news-be,news-fe,qa-be,qa-fe" --prefix-colors "blue,cyan,green,magenta,yellow,white" "npm run dev:canvas-backend" "npm run dev:canvas-frontend" "npm run dev:news-feed-backend" "npm run dev:news-feed-frontend" "npm run dev:system-design-qa-backend" "npm run dev:system-design-qa-frontend"
